title: GST Appellate Tribunal Appeals: Last Date Extended to July 31, 2026!
content:
# GST Appellate Tribunal Appeals: Last Date Extended to July 31, 2026!

Ek important update hai! Government ne GST Appellate Tribunal mein appeals file karne ki last date extend karne ka announcement kiya hai. Taxpayers ko thodi aur relief mili hai, toh chaliye details dekhte hain.

*   **Old Due Date:** Previously, the last date for filing appeals before the GST Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) was June 30, 2026, as per an earlier notification dated September 17, 2025.
*   **New Due Date:** The new extended deadline for filing appeals and applications before the GST Appellate Tribunal is now **July 31, 2026**.
*   **Reason for Extension:** This extension has been granted in response to representations from various stakeholders highlighting technical difficulties faced due to a rush to file appeals on the GSTAT portal.
*   **Applicability:** This extension primarily applies to appeals where the order being challenged was communicated to the appellant before May 1, 2026. For applications, it covers orders passed before February 1, 2026.
*   **Official Notification:** This extension has been notified vide **Notification S.O. 3502(E) dated June 30, 2026**.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.dea.gov/)

*Published on: 1 July 2026*
